config.image.label: release
config.user.user-data:
#cloud-config
output:
  all: '| tee -a /var/log/cloud-init-output.log'
runcmd:
- set -xe
- install -D -m 644 /dev/null '/var/lib/juju/nonce.txt'
- echo 'user-admin:bootstrap' > '/var/lib/juju/nonce.txt'
